This is a text file used for testing compression of various asset types.
It contains enough content to be meaningfully compressible by both gzip and brotli algorithms.

ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco
laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.
